statement: In every magma, Equation 2160 (`x = ((y * y) * z) * (w * u)`) implies Equation 4293 (`x * (x * y) = y * (y * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0640
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y y) z) (op w u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op x y)) = (op y (op y x))
